title: Ask, Mark ve Ölüm
original_title: Aşk, Mark ve Ölüm – Liebe, D-Mark und Tod
overview: Cem Kaya’s dense documentary essay celebrates 60 years of Turkish music in Germany. An alternative post-war history that is at the same time a musical Who’s Who – from Yüksel Özkasap to Derdiyoklar and Muhabbet.
